entity.label: Shelemiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Father of a captain of the ward (Jer. 37:13).

nodes.label: Shelemiah
nodes.description: Father of a captain of the ward (Jer. 37:13).

nodes.label: Hananiah
nodes.description: Grandfather of the captain who arrested Jeremiah (Jer. 37:13).

verses.text: And when he was in the gate of Benjamin, a captain of the ward was there, whose name was Irijah, the son of Shelemiah, the son of Hananiah; and he took Jeremiah the prophet, saying, Thou fallest away to the Chaldeans.
